name: construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent payment status reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Inconsistent payment status reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
features: manual entry of subcontractor payment data

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent payment status reporting leads to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and reporting of subcontractor payments
must_have_features: manual entry of subcontractor payment data

one_liner: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent payment status reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual tracking and reporting.
